title: Freshly Grilled Argentinian Chicken Skewers
description: Earthy and crisp Argentinian dish featuring lemon juice and macrobiotic friendly ingredients, perfect for a romantic dinner
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, parsley, salt, and black pepper
Add the chicken, red bell pepper, onion, and mushrooms to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the chicken and vegetables onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through
Transfer the skewers to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes before serving
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired
To keep the ingredients warm, place the skewers over a bain-marie, a water bath at 150 degrees Fahrenheit
